comments: Information of tracklisting from Hal C F Astell's website.
This show listing is not complete, as it's missing most of it.

This listing is taken from a poor quality recording that seems to be at least partly copied from other tapes with edits between tracks. It begins with tracks from Lemmy's show on 19 April 1985, progresses to what I presume is the 14 June 1985 show with a Lyin' Rampant session, then parts of what can be firmly dated to 20th July 1984 and finally a track that isn't from a Friday Rock Show. Fun times. So, best guess here.

track_listing.track: Thin Lizzy with Midge Ure - Whiskey in the Jar (live)
